CustomField.formula:
IF ( AND (Last_Order_Date_Import__c > Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c , Last_Order_Date_Import__c > Last_Order_Date__c ) , Last_Order_Date_Import__c ,
IF ( AND (Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c > Last_Order_Date_Import__c , Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c > Last_Order_Date__c ) , Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c ,
IF ( AND (Last_Order_Date__c > Last_Order_Date_Import__c , Last_Order_Date__c > Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c ) , Last_Order_Date__c ,
IF (AND ( ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_Import__c) , Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c > Last_Order_Date__c ) , Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c, IF( AND ( ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_Import__c) , Last_Order_Date__c > Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c ) , Last_Order_Date__c,
IF( AND ( ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c) , Last_Order_Date_Import__c > Last_Order_Date__c ) , Last_Order_Date_Import__c, IF( AND ( ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c) , Last_Order_Date__c > Last_Order_Date_Import__c ) , Last_Order_Date__c,
IF( AND ( ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date__c) , Last_Order_Date_Import__c > Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c ) , Last_Order_Date_Import__c, IF( AND ( ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date__c) , Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c > Last_Order_Date_Import__c ) , Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c,
IF (AND (ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date__c) , ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_Import__c)) , Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c , IF (AND (ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c) , ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_Import__c)) , Last_Order_Date__c , IF (AND (ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date__c) , ISBLANK (Last_Order_Date_from_Children_Accounts__c)) , Last_Order_Date_Import__c , NULL ))))))))))))
CustomField.label: Last Order Date
